title: gymnoschoenus anceps
intro: Gymnoschoenus anceps, also known as the prickly rush or prickly spike rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gymnoschoenus anceps include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
